steps.title: Use the weed-spread clue
steps.content: The sentence says unwelcome weeds spread easily, become unmanageable, and are hard to remove completely. In a garden, the natural goal is control: the blank needs a word for stopping or arresting that spread before it gets worse.

steps.title: Reject illogical verbs
steps.content: Choice A means getting something back. Choice B would mean preserving the spread. Choice D means acting as if something were true. The needed word means stopping progress. The answer is C.
